content.speakerText: Could I get your name and phone number, please?
content.speakerTextCn: 能告诉我您的姓名和电话吗？

options.text: My name is Lisa Chen, and my number is five hundred fifty-five thousand eighteen.
Lisa Chen. You can email me at lisa.chen@email.com.
I don't want to give you my information.

content.explanation: 正确答案是逐字念出电话号码的自然表达。干扰项2错误地将电话号码读作英文数字（应逐字念：five-five-five-zero-one-nine-two），干扰项3提供了邮箱而非电话，不符合问题要求，干扰项4是拒绝回应，不符合礼貌场景。

content.speakerText: I need to collect your details for our records. Could you tell me your full name and contact number?
content.speakerTextCn: 我需要为您登记信息，请告诉我您的全名和联系方式？

options.text: My name is John Smith. Call me at two-two-two-three-three-three.
I'm John. My number is two-two-two-three-three-three-zero.
You can find me on LinkedIn.

content.explanation: 正确答案清晰提供了全名并逐字念出电话号码（符合场景要求）。干扰项2未逐字念数字，口语中不清晰；干扰项3多了一个零，数字错误；干扰项4未提供电话，偏离问题核心。

content.speakerText: For our database, I'll need your name and a number where we can reach you.
content.speakerTextCn: 为了我们的数据库，我需要您的姓名和一个可以联系到您的电话号码。

options.text: I'm Amanda Lee. You can reach me at eight-four-four-six-one-two-nine.
Amanda Lee. My phone number is 844-6129.
I'm Amanda. Try my office number: 844-6129.
I prefer not to share personal information.

content.explanation: 正确答案符合提供信息的礼貌标准，且逐字念出电话号码便于记录。干扰项2未逐字念数字，口语中易听错；干扰项3虽正确但添加了不必要的细节（office number），干扰项4拒绝配合，不符合场景要求。

content.template: Could I get your name and phone number, please? — Sure, it's ___ Chen, 555-0192.
content.hint: 这是对话中给出的姓名，注意姓氏前用名。
content.knowledgePoint: 提供姓名时的表达习惯（名 + 姓）

content.template: My name is Tom Brown. You can call me at ___-___-___.
content.hint: 电话号码通常按三部分念：区号-中间三位-最后一位或两位，注意数字顺序。
content.knowledgePoint: 电话号码的分段表达习惯

content.hint: 完整表���姓名（名+姓）并逐字念电话号码，注意数字分组。
content.knowledgePoint: 提供完整姓名和电话号码的标准结构

content.speakerText: Could I get your name and phone number, please?
content.speakerTextCn: 能告诉我您的姓名和电话吗？
expectedAnswers: I'm Lisa Chen. You can reach me at 555-0192.
Lisa Chen. My number is five-five-five-zero-one-nine-two.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确提供了姓名和电话号码
语言准确性：姓名拼写正确，电话号码逐字清晰念出
表达自然度：语调自然，符合日常口语习惯，无机械感

content.speakerText: We need to register your details. Could you give me your full name and a contact number?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们需要登记您的信息，请提供您的全名和一个联系方式？
expectedAnswers: My name is David Park. You can call me at seven-seven-seven-two-two-two-three.
I'm David Park. My phone is seven-seven-seven-two-two-two-three.
David Park. Reach me at 777-2223 — that's seven-seven-seven-two-two-two-three.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：完整提供全名和电话号码
语言准确性：姓名格式正确（名+姓），电话号码逐字清晰表达
表达自然度：使用了恰当的连接词和语调，符合服务场景的礼貌性

content.speakerText: For our system, I'll need your name and a number to reach you.
content.speakerTextCn: 为了我们的系统，我需要您的姓名和一个可以联系到您的电话号码。
expectedAnswers: I'm Maria Lopez. My number is one-two-three-four-five-six-seven.
Maria Lopez. Call me at 123-4567 — one-two-three-four-five-six-seven.
You can contact me at Maria Lopez, one-two-three-four-five-six-seven.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确提供了姓名和电话号码
语言准确性：姓名结构完整，电话号码按数字逐字念出
表达自然度：语句流畅，无语法错误，符合真实对话节奏
